title: Blue Team Hunting Field Notes

title: regipy
notes: Offline Windows registry parsing library and plugin corpus. Release feed in Detection Rule Repositories section of dfir-feeds.opml.

title: Eric Zimmerman evtx
notes: EVTX parser and supporting event-log processing logic. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

title: Eric Zimmerman RECmd
notes: Registry command-line access and batch artifact extraction. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

title: Eric Zimmerman RegistryPlugins
notes: Registry artifact plugin definitions used by Zimmerman tooling. Commit feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

title: Eric Zimmerman Registry
notes: Offline Windows Registry parsing library. Library dependency only; releases tracked via RECmd/AppCompatCacheParser.

title: Eric Zimmerman MFTECmd
notes: NTFS $MFT and related metadata parsing. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

title: Eric Zimmerman JumpList
notes: Jump List parsing library. Library dependency; releases tracked via JLECmd.

title: Eric Zimmerman JLECmd
notes: Automatic and custom destinations Jump List parser. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

title: Eric Zimmerman LECmd
notes: Shell link parser for recent files and LNK artifacts. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

title: Eric Zimmerman Lnk
notes: Shell link parsing library. Library dependency; releases tracked via LECmd.

title: Eric Zimmerman PECmd
notes: Prefetch parser and command-line analysis tool. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

title: Eric Zimmerman Prefetch
notes: Windows Prefetch parsing library. Library dependency; releases tracked via PECmd.

title: Eric Zimmerman AppCompatCacheParser
notes: ShimCache parser across multiple Windows versions. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

title: Eric Zimmerman AmcacheParser
notes: Amcache parser for application inventory artifacts. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

title: Eric Zimmerman Srum
notes: SRUM parsing logic. Library dependency; releases tracked via SrumECmd (bundled in Get-ZimmermanTools).

title: Eric Zimmerman RBCmd
notes: Recycle Bin artifact parser. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

title: Eric Zimmerman KapeFiles
notes: Community KAPE targets and modules. Commit feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section (each commit = new target).

title: Eric Zimmerman KapeDocs
notes: KAPE documentation. Low-change-rate; reviewed manually when KapeFiles or tool releases indicate doc updates.

title: Eric Zimmerman SQLECmd
notes: SQLite parsing and triage support. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

title: Eric Zimmerman WxTCmd
notes: Windows Timeline and activity-cache parser. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

title: Eric Zimmerman OleCf
notes: OLE compound file parsing library. Library dependency; releases tracked via JLECmd.

title: Eric Zimmerman MFT
notes: NTFS MFT parsing library. Library dependency; releases tracked via MFTECmd.

title: Eric Zimmerman RecentFileCacheParser
notes: Parser for RecentFileCache.bcf. Low-frequency updates; manual-review only.

title: Eric Zimmerman WinSearchDBAnalyzer
notes: Windows Search ESE database analysis utility. Low-frequency updates; manual-review only.

title: Eric Zimmerman USBDevices
notes: Registry-backed USB device extraction. Low-frequency updates; manual-review only.

title: Eric Zimmerman ExtensionBlocks
notes: Extension block parsing library. Library dependency; releases tracked via LECmd/JLECmd.

title: Eric Zimmerman GuidMapping
notes: GUID resolution data for UserAssist, ShellBags, shell artifacts. Commit feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

title: Eric Zimmerman DFIR-SQL-Query-Repo
notes: SQL query templates for digital forensics. Commit feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

title: Eric Zimmerman RegistryExplorerBookmarks
notes: Registry Explorer bookmark definitions. Commit feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

title: Eric Zimmerman TLEFilePlugins
notes: Timeline Explorer file plugins. Low-frequency updates; manual-review only.

title: Eric Zimmerman documentation
notes: Zimmerman documentation repository. Commit feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

notes: Tool-distribution helper for the Zimmerman suite. No artifact content; manual-review only.
